evidence_direction_note: SUPERSEDED 2026-04-23 by V3-EXQ-397d (matched-endpoint metric redesign). The hippo_quality_gap probe is metric-confounded in resource-hazard-colocated envs: residue RBFs accumulate at cells the agent visits during harm (goal-adjacent by env design), so a correctly goal-directed hippocampus produces trajectories that TRAVERSE residue-dense regions. Random E2 rollouts stay near current z_world (residue-sparse). The negative hippo_quality_gap reflects goal-seeking, not harm-seeking. ARC-007 behavioural evidence remains via EXQ-114 (99.2% harm reduction MAP_NAV vs MAP_ABLATED). Previous classification non_contributory upgraded to superseded per scoring_excluded rule.
